name: Mira Mira
overview: Lizzie, a teenage girl brought back to her childhood home after the suicide of her father, is reunited under the same roof as her sister and eccentric mother. When she stumbles across a sinister mirror, she becomes trapped within the glass and replaced by an entity that seeks to tear her family apart.

trailers.title: MIRA MIRA SERIES TRAILER (2020) | Crypt TV
